intended_use: HYPER AiR is an image processing function intended to be used by radiologists and nuclear medicine physicians to reduce noise and improve contrast of fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) PET images.
intended_use_full: HYPER AiR is an image processing function intended to be used by radiologists and nuclear medicine physicians to reduce noise and improve contrast of fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) PET images.
target_condition: fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) PET imaging requiring noise reduction and contrast enhancement
ground_truth: Comparison with OSEM (conventional ordered subset expectation maximization algorithm)
other_metrics: Performance on noise reduction, performance on image contrast, performance on contrast to noise ratio; clinical reader assessment by three board-certified nuclear medicine physicians of image contrast, image noise, and image quality
